params._exclusionList: A list of pool booster addresses to skip

params._initData: Encoded call data matching the one used in createPoolBoosterMerkl
params._salt: Unique number matching the one used in createPoolBoosterMerkl

params._initData: Encoded call data for initializing the proxy
params._salt: Unique number that determines the proxy address

params._poolBoosterAddress: Address of the pool booster to remove

removePoolBoosterByIndex(uint256).details: More gas-efficient than removePoolBooster when the index is known

params._index: Index of the pool booster in the poolBoosters array

bribeAll(address[]).notice: Calls bribe() on all pool boosters, skipping those in the exclusion list

claimGovernance().notice: Claim Governance of the contract to a new account (`newGovernor`). Can only be called by the new Governor.

computePoolBoosterAddress(uint256,bytes).notice: Compute the deterministic address of a BeaconProxy

createPoolBoosterMerkl(address,bytes,uin.notice: Create a Pool Booster for Merkl using a BeaconProxy

governor().notice: Returns the address of the current Governor.

isGovernor().notice: Returns true if the caller is the current Governor.

removePoolBooster(address).notice: Removes a pool booster from the internal list

removePoolBoosterByIndex(uint256).notice: Removes a pool booster at a specific index from the internal list

transferGovernance(address).notice: Transfers Governance of the contract to a new account (`newGovernor`). Can only be called by the current Governor. Must be claimed for this to complete

userdoc.notice: Factory for creating Merkl pool boosters using BeaconProxy.
